title: Column validation in multi-level boards (work management)
excerpt:
Description
The column validation setting is not available in multi-level boards but is available on all other boards as well as projects.  When is the feature being added to multi-level boards too please as seems an ove…

posts.author: MelH (Melanie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The column validation setting is not available in multi-level boards but is available on all other boards as well as projects. When is the feature being added to multi-level boards too please as seems an oversight.

What are you trying to achieve

Column validation on multi-level boards

posts.author: MelH (Melanie)
posts.cookedHtml: No, I mean the column validation feature that says what content is allowed in the column - the feature is on normal boards and projects, but seems to have been omitted from Multi-level boards.

posts.author: ProjectMastermind (IngenuityKat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Melanie:

column validation

Ah! Found it! Data validations – Support

I agree that this should also work in multi-level boards.
